component.name: KeelDB
component.summary: Visual database studio — explore, migrate, and diagram your databases

description.p: KeelDB is a desktop database studio for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Supabase and Neon. Browse and edit data, manage structure, indexes and foreign keys, run SQL with a safety guard (affected-row preview, transaction sandbox, automatic pre-write snapshots with undo), and monitor database health.

It also includes a full data-migration wizard with column mapping, transforms and checkpoint/resume, a dbdiagram-style ER diagram designer with DBML, AI assistance, and SQL import/export, plus a toolkit of 25+ developer utilities.

screenshot.caption: Database explorer — browse and edit data with safety guards
ER diagram designer with DBML and AI assistance
Data migration wizard with column mapping
